name: Role Synthesis
summary: A path for people who want a balanced path that turns breadth into action through a role lens, practical projects, and real-world application.
thesis: Synthesize subjects and topics into useful capability through a chosen role pathway.
fitSignals: Wants breadth that turns into action
Likes the idea of learning through roles and projects
Needs both structure and practical payoff
Sees value in connecting many domains rather than mastering one alone

defaults.reviewRhythm: Two foundation sessions, one role session, and one project session per week
defaults.milestoneTemplate: Synthesize {coreSubject} and {supportingTopic} into a concrete project through the {role} lens

weeklyCadencePresets.gentle: 3 sessions per week with one simple project step
weeklyCadencePresets.balanced: 4 sessions per week with one role synthesis block
weeklyCadencePresets.ambitious: 5 to 6 sessions per week with live project work
weeklyCadencePresets.obsessive: Daily study, build, and review cycles
